column1: # F2 switches the current cell into EDIT mode with the entry buffer
# pre-populated from the cell's source form (prefix + text for labels,
# general-format string for numbers).  Commit re-applies the first-char
# F2 on an empty cell: mode → EDIT, buffer empty, ESC returns to READY.
# Enter a label, then F2 to edit.
# Append to the label and commit.
# Edit a VALUE: F2 loads the general-format number as the buffer.
# Re-typing a `"` prefix via EDIT converts a default-prefix label to Quote.
